title: Proration on plan upgrades
summary: Mid-cycle upgrades prorate immediately. Downgrades apply at the next renewal unless support approves an exception.

title: Refund window
summary: Monthly plan refunds are only available within 7 calendar days of initial purchase and only when usage is under the abuse threshold.

title: Coupon policy
summary: Support cannot invent or stack discounts that are not already active in the billing system.
